feed.title: Integration Ninja Cats
feed.subtitle: Your central place to start your Microsoft+SAP integration journey and keep up to date with the latest community efforts.

entry.title: Integrating SAP Business Processes in Microsoft Teams using SAP Business Technology Platform

link.title: Integrating SAP Business Processes in Microsoft Teams using SAP Business Technology Platform

entry.summary: Enterprise business users are looking to shift from standard web-based experience to alternate channels for performing their day-to-day business operations. It is becoming quite evident to enable these users with multi-channel user experience to increase the usability and ease of performing their tasks. SAP and Microsoft are creating innovation together by integrating Microsoft Teams across SA...

entry.title: Extend your Business Processes with the new SAP Private Link service

link.title: Extend your Business Processes with the new SAP Private Link service

entry.summary: In this blog post, I would like to share how you can enhance your extensions running on SAP BTP to securely consume the data from the SAP S/4HANA system with the help of SAP Private Link Service (Beta).

entry.title: Of Kings & Queens and SAP scans to identify the right lineage for a marriage proposal

link.title: Of Kings & Queens and SAP scans to identify the right lineage for a marriage proposal

entry.summary: Origin and lineage are fundamental properties being used to balance trustworthiness, value, and quality for all sorts of things in life. In addition to that, it requires credible parties confirming those properties and traceability to prove a claimed lineage. The ancient monarchs didn’t want to get engaged with impostors resulting in damage to their reputation and heritage. The same is true for...

entry.title: Manual Recovery Guide for SAP HANA on Azure Large Instance from storage snapshot with AzAcSnap

link.title: Manual Recovery Guide for SAP HANA on Azure Large Instance from storage snapshot with AzAcSnap

entry.summary: Overview This article provides guidance on using SAP HANA Studio to recover SAP HANA on Azure Large Instances. This article has step-by-step screenshots to follow to understand the three primary methods of recovering SAP HANA using HANA Studio from a snapshot taken using the Microsoft provided snapshot tools.

entry.title: Open your SAP OData APIs for some swagger – or how to make friends with the other kids from the API block

link.title: Open your SAP OData APIs for some swagger – or how to make friends with the other kids from the API block

entry.summary: Dear community, Me and Will Eastbury have been busy building upon the work of the Oasis Foundation in the OData + OpenAPI space, where SAP and Microsoft are large contributors. Today is the day of easily converting your OData metadata into the widely spread OpenAPI definition and making that available to external consumers. Hence, opening your platform to a wide eco system of APIs and develope...
